name: tagma-desktop
description: Electron desktop shell for Tagma Editor

scripts.build:deps: cd ../editor && bun run build && bun run build:sidecar
scripts.build:all: bun run build:deps && bun run build
scripts.pack: bun run build:all && bun run fetch:opencode && bun run fetch:bun && node ./scripts/stage-sidecar.mjs && electron-builder --dir
scripts.dist:win: TAGMA_BUN_COMPILE_TARGET=bun-windows-x64-baseline bun run build:all && bun ./scripts/fetch-opencode.mjs --platform=win32 --arch=x64 && bun ./scripts/fetch-bun.mjs --platform=win32 --arch=x64 && node ./scripts/stage-sidecar.mjs x64 && electron-builder --win
scripts.dist:linux: TAGMA_BUN_COMPILE_TARGET=bun-linux-x64-baseline bun run build:all && bun ./scripts/fetch-opencode.mjs --platform=linux --arch=x64 && bun ./scripts/fetch-bun.mjs --platform=linux --arch=x64 && node ./scripts/stage-sidecar.mjs x64 && electron-builder --linux
scripts.dist:mac: bun run build:all && node ./scripts/build-mac-sidecars.mjs && bun ./scripts/fetch-opencode.mjs --platform=darwin --arch=arm64 && bun ./scripts/fetch-opencode.mjs --platform=darwin --arch=x64 && bun ./scripts/fetch-bun.mjs --platform=darwin --arch=arm64 && bun ./scripts/fetch-bun.mjs --platform=darwin --arch=x64 && node ./scripts/stage-sidecar.mjs arm64 x64 && electron-builder --mac --arm64 --x64
